company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is an AI-powered SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators.

plans.name: Pro Plan
features: Priority 24/7 live chat and phone support
plans.ideal_for: Professional content creators, agencies, and growing channels

policies.details: AutoStream offers a 7-day money-back guarantee. Refunds are not available after the 7-day window. Contact support@autostream.io.
24/7 live chat and phone support is exclusively available for Pro Plan subscribers. Basic Plan users receive email support with a 48-hour response time.
Users can cancel at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing cycle.
AutoStream offers a 14-day free trial for new users on the Pro Plan. No credit card required.
For teams larger than 3 users, AutoStream offers custom pricing. Contact sales@autostream.io.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: Exports are optimized for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, Twitter/X, and LinkedIn.

faqs.question: Do I need video editing experience?
faqs.answer: Not at all! AutoStream is designed to be beginner-friendly. The AI handles the heavy lifting.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time from your account settings.

faqs.question: Is my video data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes. AutoStream uses AES-256 encryption. Your videos are never used for training AI models without consent.
